creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 244650
www/qutebrowser: Update to 3.0.0 and flavourise WebEngine with Qt-5 or Qt-6

Hi all,

Latest .diff:
• install man page
• add ${flavor_CONFLICTS_INSTALL} 
• add local patches to modify the default GUI editor from gvim to neovim-qt

Regarding the MOVED entry, I added an entry similar to security/gpgme-qt5:

> www/qutebrowser|www/qutebrowser@qt5|2023-09-05|Flavorize, qutebrowser@qt5 (default), or use www/qutebrowser@qt6

However, this prevented me from building the -qt6 variation. I have only tested the Qt6 variation, and it works great, with nvim-qt too.
